ThingDef.label: M5 Medical Bag
ThingDef.description: The M5 Medical Backpack is a BLUFOR backpack used exclusively by U.S. military forces.

ThingDef.label: RUSH 24 backpack
ThingDef.description: The 5.11 RUSH 24 backpack. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 40 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: RUSH 12 backpack
ThingDef.description: The 5.11 RUSH 12 backpack. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 35 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: AMAP III backpack
ThingDef.description: The AMAP III backpack. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 33 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: A&C Hero backpack
ThingDef.description: The HA&C Hero backpack. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 32 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Azimut SS rucksack
ThingDef.description: The Azimut SS Kangaroo rucksack. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 70 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Bearpac 20 backpack
ThingDef.description: The Bearpac 20 survival pack from the Bear Grylls line of backpacks. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 34 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Vulcan IV bergen
ThingDef.description: The Berghaus Vulcan IV bergen. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 70 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Motherlode daysack
ThingDef.description: The Camelbak Motherlode backpack. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 38 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Student backpack
ThingDef.description: The backpack used by students, ideal for simplicity and practicality. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 24 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: FANDARE Sling Bag
ThingDef.description: The FANDARE canvas sling bag. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 27 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Tomahawk pack
ThingDef.description: The Flyye Tomahawk pack. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 33 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Gootium canvas rucksack
ThingDef.description: The Gootium 21101 canvas rucksack. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 38 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Bail out bag
ThingDef.description: The Helikon-tex Bail out bag. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 30 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Hello Kitty backpack
ThingDef.description: The Hello Kitty backpack. This backpack allows the wearer to look super kawaii and carry up to 32 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Raven 2500 backpack
ThingDef.description: The Kelty Raven 2500 backpack. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 40 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Level 1 backpack
ThingDef.description: The Level 1 backpack. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 24 KG for caravan trips and other battle royale related activities.

ThingDef.label: LBT jump pack
ThingDef.description: The LBT 0101JJ "Enhanced Warfighter Jump Pack" from the London Bridge Trading company. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 50 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Naotak Gearslinger
ThingDef.description: The Maxpedition Naotak Gearslinger. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 24 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Assault pack
ThingDef.description: The MIL-TEC assault pack. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 35 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: MOLLE 2 rucksack (UCP)
ThingDef.description: The MOLLE 2 rucksack in UCP camo. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 75 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Merlin backpack
ThingDef.description: The Merlin backpack from Mountain Warehouse. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 34 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Nitecore BP20 pack
ThingDef.description: The Nitecore tactical backpack. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 35 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Terra 65 rucksack
ThingDef.description: The North Face Terra 65 rucksack. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 65 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Outdoor Master hiking pack
ThingDef.description: The Outdoor Master Hiking backpack. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 36 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Tarp backpack
ThingDef.description: The Superdry Tarp backpack. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 32 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Tactix Half-Day backpack
ThingDef.description: The Tactix Half-Day backpack. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 35 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: FAST pack
ThingDef.description: The Triple Aught Design FAST Pack Litespeed backpack. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 40 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Warrior helmet carrier pack
ThingDef.description: The Elite Ops Warrior helmet carrier pack. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 35 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Warrior Pegasus backpack
ThingDef.description: The Elite Ops Warrior Pegasus backpack. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 40 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Wasing pack
ThingDef.description: The Wasing Hydration Pack. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 20 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.

ThingDef.label: Synergy 16" backpack
ThingDef.description: The Synergy 16" laptop bag from the WENGER line of backpacks. This backpack allows the wearer to carry up to 34 KG for caravan trips and other outdoor activities.
